items.title: New Patch - v0.B260328
items.body:
Sorry about that, I rushed an update to rework the meditation system mini-game and forgot to include the required files. My apologies again, here is the patch: https://pixeldrain.com/u/WNGcB6Lp 

🔄️ | patch mini-game and add img
❌ | Delete anti-cheat

items.title: Alpha 260220
items.body:
✅ | Added the Principal story.
✅ | Added the Principal and Mayor house.
✅ | Added a quick explanatory tutorial system at the start of each new game.
✅ | Added the Mayor story.
🔄️ | Rework of the voting system for increasing the city's corruption.
✅ | Added the Countryside, Forest, and Beach locations, accessible only by vehicle.
✅ | Added more than 677 videos.
✅ | Added apartment locations for all classmates and the best friend.
🔄️ | Bug fixes when export and import saves.
✅ | Added the Classmate 2 story.
✅ | Added the Classmate 3 story.
🔄️ | Bug fixes and refinement of certain systems.
✅ | Added the Classmate 1 story.
🔄️ | Actress change for Classmate 2.
✅ | Added the Bestfriend story.
✅ | Added the Landlady story.
✅ | Added the Housemate Female story.
✅ | Added a Characters category in Storys Menu.
🔄️ | Changed the Talk system. Now, to continue corrupting and progress the story, you must talk to the NPC.
✅ | Added a dynamic corruption mini-game.
✅ | Added several achievements.
✅ | Added the contact system in the phone.
🔄️ | Multiple visual changes.
✅ | Added various micro functions.
🔄️ | Fixed multiple bugs.
✅ | Added Phone system, with inventory, taxi, email, and parameters.
✅ | Added Save system in HubMenu.
✅ | Added HubMenu with Story, Cheats, Options, Achievements and Support.
🔄️ | Update menu and sound for Deal and Fight System.
✅ | Added a different sound design.
✅ | Added a main menu.
🔄️ | Complete visual overhaul.
✅ | Added a pause menu.
✅ | Added a system for setting an NPCs name and role on first encounter.
✅ | Added a standalone .exe to launch the game.
✅ | Added a logging system using logs.txt for the .exe version.
✅ | Added a top bar displaying player statistics.

items.title: Alpha 250911
items.body:
🔄️ | Internal interaction page system overhaul.
🔄️ | Affection now reduces corruption difficulty. Higher Affection makes corruption easier.
🔄️ | Talk interactions now grant limited affection per corruption level.
🔄️ | Replacement of the LawsCorruption system with CityCorruption, blocking interactions when the NPC is outside and when the CityCorruption level has not reached a required threshold.
✅ | Several small changes to make the game more enjoyable and less grindy.
✅ | Added the story tracking system.
✅ | Added stripper scenes to the strip club.
🔄️ | Removed the daily limit on meditation usage.
✅ | Added maximum energy increase through the Fitness attribute every 20 points.
🔄️ | Minor bug fixes.
✅ | Added affection gain during sexual interactions.
✅ | Added various small details.
🔄️ | Main menu UI changes.
🔄️ | Updates to several smaller menus.
✅ | Added Auto-Save system.
🔄️ | Corruption system rework.
✅ | Added interaction images for the Principal including Grope, Handjob, Blowjob, Pussy, and Anal.
✅ | Added interaction images for the Classmate including Grope, Handjob, Blowjob, Pussy, and Anal.
🔄️ | Cheat Menu rework.
✅ | Added Cheat Menu.
✅ | Added interaction images for the Classmate including Grope, Handjob, Blowjob, Pussy, and Anal.
✅ | Added interaction images for the Mayor and Classmate 2 including Grope, Handjob, Blowjob, Pussy, and Anal.
✅ | Added the voting system at City Hall.
✅ | Added story content involving Dealer W.
🔄️ | Reworked The Pit spectator system.
🔄️ | Combat system rework.
🔄️ | Inventory system rework.
✅ | Added the Gift system.
✅ | Added Medkit purchasing and hospital healing.
✅ | Added the ThePit area including scoreboard, betting, and combat systems.
✅ | Added interaction images for the BestFriend.
✅ | Added dialogues for the final NPCs.
🔄️ | Redesigned the StoryCaption.
✅ | Added drug dealing zones.
✅ | Added interaction images for the Housemate Female and Landlady including Grope, Handjob, Blowjob, Pussy, and Anal.
✅ | Added the drug dealing system with multiple drug types, zones, and police or rival encounter chances.
✅ | Added Police and Hospital zones.
🔄️ | Added descriptions for certain sellable items.
✅ | Added the drug purchasing system in the TrapHouse.
✅ | Initialized Grope, Handjob, Blowjob, Pussy, and Anal interaction pages for all NPCs.
✅ | Added interaction menu images for Housemate Female and Landlady.
🔄️ | Disabled certain interactions when a male NPC is not trans or futa.
✅ | Added TV interaction in the LivingRoom.
✅ | Added the Boss of Sexshop.
✅ | Added new zones including Traphouse, Sexshop, and Stripclub.
✅ | Added interaction pages for all current NPCs.
🔄️ | Dialogue text revisions.
🔄️ | Various aesthetic changes.
✅ | Added email warning message.
✅ | Added final College and CityHall areas.
✅ | Placed NPCs in their respective zones.
✅ | Added dialogue texts for multiple NPCs.
✅ | Project creation and foundation systems.
✅ | Placement of core locations.
✅ | Implementation of meditation and work mini-games.
✅ | Early story introduction via StartStory.
✅ | Initial NPC interaction system.
✅ | Core stat progression, shops, and interaction systems.
